speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Sports and competitions
questions: Did you play any sports when you were young?
Did your team ever win a competition?
How did you train for it?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I played football when I was young. Yes, my team defeated every other team in a competition once. We trained every afternoon before the match.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe a fun weekend

cueCard.topic: Describe a fun weekend you had with friends.
bullets: and explain why it was fun

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about a weekend at the beach. We went there with some friends. We had a wonderful time, and we saw a beautiful sunset together. It was fun because everyone came and we made a small bonfire.
